features.name: varxref through sel in nonblocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to an interface variable accessed via cross-reference with array indexing, where a VARXREF node passes through a SEL node
features.snippet:
interface intf; logic [7:0] writedata; endinterface
module top; intf the_intf(); logic [3:0] i; initial the_intf.writedata[i] <= '1; endmodule
